name: H M Ramirez Bus Co Inc
registry_source: NM PED School Bus Contractor List; Yelp listing 'Ramirez H M Bus Company' Hobbs NM
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER returned no matches for 'Ramirez Bus', 'H M Ramirez', or 'H M Ramirez Bus'. Confirmed as active NM school bus contractor via NM Public Education Dept contractor list. Hector M. Ramirez is the owner per Yelp and NM contractor records. NM SOS business registry not directly searchable via WebFetch; corporate filing date not confirmed online.

name: Metcalf Bus Svc
registry_source: MN SOS portal (mblsportal.sos.mn.gov) - search returned system error during access
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate or defunct). FMCSA SAFER returned no records for 'METCALF BUS' or 'METCALF'. The listed address 1501 Belsly Blvd #314, Moorhead is a unit in the Crossing at Waters Edge apartment/independent living community, suggesting an inactive or retired home-based one-truck operator. A separate 'Roger Metcalf' USDOT 1112807 exists in Glyndon MN (not Moorhead) but is registered as general freight with 1 truck/1 driver - likely unrelated. Moorhead Public Schools' current contractor is Richards Transportation Service Inc, not Metcalf. MN SOS web portal returned errors and could not confirm registry status.

name: Ciufo Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet, Manta, Yelp, Yellow Pages business directories; MD SDAT Business Express not directly searchable via WebFetch
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER returned no matches for 'CIUFO' or 'CIUFO BUS'. Founded 1974 per D&B. Address per Summit list: 3706 Green Spring Rd, Havre De Grace MD. Also listed at 345 Paradise Rd, Aberdeen MD per Yelp. Owner Leonard Ciufo, phone (410) 836-2360. D&B estimates revenue $1.5M-$1.75M, 10-19 employees. MD SDAT direct registry lookup blocked by CAPTCHA/error; exact charter date and Department ID not retrievable online.

name: Mac KALL School Bus Svc LLC

Likely a small Calvert County Public Schools bus contractor; CCPS uses individual bus contractor companies, and the LLC suffix suggests recent formation. Address 1475 Solomons Island Rd, Huntingtown MD 20639 (Calvert County). Bizapedia found other 'MacKall' Maryland entities (Mackall Tribe Legacy LLC in Lusby, Main and Mackall LLC in Middletown) but not this specific bus LLC. MD SDAT direct portal blocked by CAPTCHA/error during this run.
